Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jul-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing through CourtCall for plaintiff and moving party Robert Williams.

RULING: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER SUBSTITUTING SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR DECEASED PLAINTIFF
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED pursuant to CCP 377.31. Pamela D. Williams is substituted as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff, Robert E. Williams. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
